privileged_info_summary: The task creates a new staff user account 'ops_coordinator' with first name 'Maria', last name 'Rodriguez', and email 'maria.rodriguez@skyviewaerial.io' in an Aerobridge Django admin panel accessible at http://localhost:8000/admin/. The user must be configured with staff privileges enabled (is_staff=true) and superuser privileges disabled (is_superuser=false), with password 'FlightOps2024!'. The verifier validates user creation by checking user existence, name/email accuracy, staff status, superuser status, and password validity. Critical security requirement: the account must NOT be a superuser despite being a staff account.
